scripts.dev: concurrently -n "server,user,admin" -c "blue,green,magenta" "NODE_ENV=development JWT_SECRET=dev-secret-12345678 HOST=127.0.0.1 PORT=3001 pnpm --filter server exec tsx watch src/app.ts" "VITE_APP_ENTRY=user VITE_DEV_PORT=3000 VITE_DEV_PROXY_TARGET=http://127.0.0.1:3001 VITE_ADMIN_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3002 pnpm --filter client dev:user --host 127.0.0.1" "VITE_APP_ENTRY=admin VITE_CUSTOMER_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 VITE_DEV_PORT=3002 VITE_DEV_PROXY_TARGET=http://127.0.0.1:3001 pnpm --filter client dev:admin --host 127.0.0.1"
